title: I do what mojang does not
description: It will add a BrainInAJar, DispenserColorApplier, VillagerOnALeash, FlowerColorApplier, and EveryBlockDealsFallDamage to your Survival Gameplay :
body: ## Features | Feature | IDWMDN | Mojang | |---------------------------------------------------------|------------|--------| | [DispenserColorApplier](#DispenserColorApplier) | 17.12.2023 | | | [VillagerOnALeash](#VillagerOnALeash) | 18.12.2023 | | | [FlowerColorApplier](#FlowerColorApplier) | 18.12.2023 | | | [BrainInAJar](#BrainInAJar) | 01.01.2024 | | | [EveryBlockDealsFallDamage](#EveryBlockDealsFallDamage) | 22.10.2024 | | ## DispenserColorApplier Dispensers can apply color to Sheep. #### Config: - `neverDispenseDye` - If true, dispensers will never dispense dye - `ignoreBabySheep` - If false, baby sheep can be dyed - `ignoreSameColoredSheep` - If false, sheep with the same color can be dyed - `ignoreNamedSheep` - If false, named sheep can be dyed - `ignoreColoredSheep` - If false, colored sheep can be dyed ## VillagerOnALeash Villagers can be leashed #### Config: - `ignoreJoblessVillager` - If false, jobless villagers can be leashed - `ignoreBabyVillager` - If false, baby villagers can be leashed - `ignoreAdventureMode` - If false, villagers can be leashed in adventure mode - `ignoreNamedVillager` - If false, named villagers can be leashed - `ignoreWorkingVillager` - If false, working villagers can be leashed ## FlowerColorApplier Sheeps can eat flowers and get the color of the flower #### Config: - `ignoreBabySheep` - If false, baby sheep can eat flowers - `ignoreColoredSheep` - If false, colored sheep can eat flowers - `ignoreNamedSheep` - If false, named sheep can eat flowers ## BrainInAJar A Experience Storage for your XP. It´ll collect XP orbs in a adjustable block radius and store them in the Brain. You can get the XP back by Left-Clicking the Brain. By Shift-Righ-Clicking you can pick up the Brain. The Crafting Recipe is fully adjustable in the Config. #### Commands: - `/braininajar give` - Gives you a Brain in a Jar - ``idwmdn.braininajar`` - Permission to use the command - `/braininajar summon` - Summons a Brain in a Jar at your location - ``idwmdn.braininajar`` - Permission to use the command #### Config: - `recipe-enable` - If false, the crafting recipe will be disabled - `recipe` - The crafting recipe for the Brain in a Jar - `shape` - The shape of the recipe - `ingredients` - The ingredients of the recipe - `result` - The result of the recipe - `sounds` - The sounds of the Brain in a Jar - `pickup` - The sound when you pick up the Brain in a Jar - `place` - The sound when you place the Brain in a Jar - `absorb` - The sound when the Brain in a Jar absorbs XP - `tractorBeam` - The sound when the Brain in a Jar pulls XP - `start` - The sound when the Brain in a Jar starts pulling XP - `stop` - The sound when the Brain in a Jar stops pulling XP - `limits` - The limits of the Brain in a Jar - `storage` - The maximum amount of XP the Brain in a Jar can store - `tractorBeamRange` - The maximum range of the Brain in a Jar - `skull` - The Skull of the Brain in a Jar - `activate` - The Skull when the Brain in a Jar is active - `texture` - The texture of the Skull - `uuid` - The uuid of the Skull - `inactive` - The Skull when the Brain in a Jar is inactive - `texture` - The texture of the Skull - `uuid` - The uuid of the Skull - `full` - The Skull when the Brain in a Jar is full - `texture` - The texture of the Skull - `uuid` - The uuid of the Skull ## EveryBlockDealsFallDamage All falling blocks deal damage based on block hardness or a fixed value. #### Config: - `damagePerBlockType` - Determines how damage is calculated. Options: `FIXED`, `HARDNESS` - `fixedDamagePerBlock` - The fixed amount of damage per block if `damagePerBlockType` is set to `FIXED` - `maxDamage` - The maximum damage a falling block can deal. If set to `-1`, the damage is unlimited #### Mechanics: - Falling blocks will deal damage to entities they land on. - Damage can be based on the block's hardness or a fixed value, configurable through the settings. - Entities hurt by falling blocks will suffer damage based on the settings in the config. ## Coming soon: - Zombie villagers can be leashed ## Maybe in the future: - Dispensers can apply color to leather armor on armor stands and players - Dispensers can apply color to Wolf collars - Bee Remake :) - Special Bee Hives (Biom specific, Rare, ...) - Bees can drop flowerseeds on the way back to the hive - Bees attack you if you destroy a flower near them - Cats will kick you out of the bed if you sleep in their bed # If you have any requests, please let me know on [Discord](https://discord.gg/freddi). ## Metrics This plugin uses bStats to collect some (non-identifying) data about the servers it runs on. You can opt-out by editing the `config.yml` in the `/plugins/bStats` folder located in your server directory. (More information [here](https://bstats.org/getting-started)) [](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/i-do-what-mojang-does-not)
